name: Peach Melba Layer Cake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease and flour two 8-inch round cake pans.
3. In a separate bowl, mix peach fruit spread with warm water. This mixture can be used as a substitute for the pourable fruit.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl; set aside.
5. Beat softened butter at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Blend egg yolks and vanilla into the butter mixture.
7. Alternately add dry ingredients to the butter mixture, followed by apple juice concentrate, beating well after each addition.
8. Spread batter evenly into prepared pans.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool cakes for 10 minutes in pans on wire racks.
11. Remove from pans and cool completely.
Drain peaches, then combine them with raspberries and pourable fruit. Mix lightly.
Spread peach fruit spread evenly over one cake layer, followed by the second cake layer.
Spoon the fruit mixture onto the top of the cake, allowing excess to drip down the sides.
